statements.text: Federal Reserve Board announces it has made the joint findings with the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency required for the OCC to approve a request by Morgan Stanley Bank, N.A., for an exemption under section 23A of the Federal Reserve Act. Federal Reserve Board announces it has made the joint findings with the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency required for the OCC to approve a request by Morgan Stanley Bank, N.A., for an exemption under section 23A of the Federal Reserve Act
statements.summary: Routine regulatory exemption for Morgan Stanley inter-affiliate transactions—minimal broad equity impact

statements.text: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of United Bank. Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of United Bank
statements.summary: Routine Fed enforcement action against former employee; no systemic or market implications

statements.text: Ordered 100% tariffs on certain branded pharmaceutical imports, overhauled steel aluminum and copper duties
statements.summary: 100% pharma tariffs + metal duty overhaul creates inflationary pressure; bearish for equities near-term

statements.text: Not interested in reopening Strait of Hormuz. Allies must find courage to secure it themselves
statements.summary: US withdrawal from Hormuz security signals geopolitical risk premium and potential oil supply shock; moderately bearish for equities via stagflation concerns

statements.text: US will intensify military actions against Iran and hit them extremely hard over the next 2-3 weeks
statements.summary: Iran escalation with 2-3 week timeline triggers risk-off, oil spike; defense gains offset by broad weakness

statements.text: Iran president has just asked the United States of America for a CEASEFIRE
statements.summary: Iran ceasefire request signals geopolitical risk de-escalation; reduces energy premium and defense tail risk, bullish for US equities

statements.text: Liberation Day anniversary: all existing tariffs remain in place, new pharmaceutical tariffs coming
statements.summary: Pharmaceutical tariffs announced; tariff regime maintained—modest bearish headwind for healthcare and broad equities

statements.text: Powell: Federal Reserve prepared to act as appropriate to support the economy amid geopolitical uncertainty
statements.summary: Fed signals dovish flexibility to support economy amid geopolitical uncertainty—routine reassurance with modest positive tilt

statements.text: Iran war launched: US strikes Iranian nuclear and military facilities
statements.summary: US military escalation vs Iran triggers oil spike, geopolitical premium, flight-to-safety rotation
